# HBCU Yard Pass

Yard Pass is an exclusive membership savings card built specifically for the HBCU culture — celebrating the pride, community, and lifestyle of Historically Black Colleges and Universities. The brand blends financial empowerment with cultural identity, allowing members to save money while proudly representing their organizations and traditions. With access to over one million discounts across a massive nationwide network, Yard Pass transforms every purchase — from everyday dining to iconic HBCU events like homecomings, step shows, and cruises — into an opportunity to save. The brand carries a strong sense of community, belonging, and cultural pride at its core.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Save Big, Rep Loud &amp; Proud — HBCU Yard Pass

URL: https://example.com
Description: Unlock over one million discounts built for HBCU culture. From homecoming to everyday dining, get your anytime fitness membership discount and more. Join now!

The Exclusive Membership Savings Card



# Your Yard Pass toExtraordinary Savings



### Access over one million discounts nationwide — for dining, travel, shopping, entertainment, services, and every HBCU moment that matters.



Explore Your Benefits
Talk to Our Team

















How It Works

## Every Purchase Becomes aCultural Moment to Save


The Yard Pass transforms everyday spending into extraordinary savings — while keeping you rooted in the HBCU culture you love. Whether you're grabbing dinner after a chapter meeting or booking travel for homecoming weekend, your pass is always working for you.




01


### Everyday Spending, Reimagined




From dining out and grocery runs to fitness memberships and family entertainment, your Yard Pass plugs into the moments that make up daily life. Access over one million discounts nationwide — the kind of savings that quietly add up every single week.


Dining
Shopping
Family Activities
Services







02


### Travel & Exploration on Your Terms




Planning a cruise, a leadership summit, or a family vacation? The Yard Pass opens doors to travel savings that let you explore more while spending less. Every trip becomes an opportunity to represent your organization with pride — and keep more money in your pocket.


Travel
Cruises
Vacations
Conferences







03


### The Culture, the Community, the Savings




Homecomings, step shows, chapter meetings, and Greek life gatherings — these are the moments that define the HBCU experience. Yard Pass is built for exactly this lifestyle, turning every cultural occasion into a chance to save while staying connected to the organizations and traditions you love.


Homecoming
Step Shows
Chapter Meetings
Leadership Summits

















1M+
Discounts Nationwide


















Why the Yard Pass

## Built for the HBCU Lifestyle.Every Dollar. Every Moment.


From the yard to the world — your Yard Pass works wherever you are, saving you money while you represent with pride.













### Over One Million Discounts Nationwide


Your Yard Pass plugs you into a massive nationwide savings network — one of the largest in the country. Whether you're in Atlanta, Houston, D.C., or anywhere in between, extraordinary savings are always within reach.

Dining · Travel · Shopping · Services · Entertainment










### Everyday Spending Becomes Everyday Savings


Every time you dine out, travel, shop, entertain your family, or purchase services, your Yard Pass transforms the moment into a savings opportunity. It's not a coupon — it's a lifestyle upgrade that works quietly in the background.

Groceries · Fitness · Auto · Health · Family Fun










### Made for Every HBCU Moment


Homecoming. Step shows. Cruises. Chapter meetings. Leadership summits. Family vacations. The Yard Pass was built for the full rhythm of HBCU life — so you can save money while proudly representing the organizations and traditions you love.

Homecomings · Greek Life · Conferences · Cruises · Summits




















Life With the Yard Pass

## Woven Into Every Moment That Matters


From the dinner table to the homecoming yard, Yard Pass moves with you — helping members represent their organizations and save on the moments, big and small, that define the HBCU experience.



































### "Represent the organizations you love — and save on every experience that brings your community together."

The Yard Pass Promise

Membership Benefits



# Your Pass to Extraordinary Savings — Rooted in HBCU Culture


The Yard Pass is more than a discount card — it's your community companion. Designed exclusively for the HBCU lifestyle, it unlocks access to over one million discounts nationwide, turning every purchase into an opportunity to save while proudly representing the organizations, traditions, and culture you love.



- Everyday Savings, Every Category Dining, travel, shopping, entertainment, and services — all in one card.

- Built for the HBCU Community Homecomings, step shows, Greek life, cruises, and leadership summits covered.

- Over One Million Discounts Nationwide A massive savings network that grows with every membership.



Explore All Benefits









1M+
Discounts Nationwide
















What's Included

## Every Purchase, an Opportunity to Save


Your Yard Pass unlocks over one million discounts across a nationwide savings network — turning everyday spending into extraordinary savings no matter where life takes you.












### Dining


From quick bites between classes to celebratory dinners at homecoming weekend, your Yard Pass delivers real savings at thousands of restaurants nationwide — so every meal out feels like a win.












### Travel


Whether you're heading to a chapter conference, leadership summit, or planning a HBCU cruise, your Yard Pass unlocks hotel rates, car rentals, and flight deals that make every trip more affordable.












### Shopping


Represent your school with pride without breaking the bank. Yard Pass members save on apparel, gear, electronics, and everyday essentials — because looking good and saving money should go hand in hand.












### Entertainment


Step shows, concerts, sporting events, and more — your Yard Pass connects you to exclusive discounts on the experiences that define HBCU culture. Enjoy every moment without the full price tag.












### Family Fun


Bring the whole family into the Yard. From theme parks and museums to family vacations and local attractions, Yard Pass helps you create lasting memories while keeping more money in your pocket.












### Services


Health, wellness, fitness memberships — including anytime fitness membership discounts — auto care, professional services, and more. Your Yard Pass extends savings into the everyday necessities that keep your life running smoothly.
























How It Works

## Your Yard Pass Journey


Three simple steps stand between you and a lifetime of savings rooted in HBCU culture. No complications — just community, pride, and everyday value.










01








### Join the Membership


Sign up for your Yard Pass and become part of an exclusive community built for HBCU culture. Your membership card connects you to over one million discounts across the country — instantly.








02








### Use It Every Day & At Every Event


Whether you're dining out, shopping, traveling, or attending homecoming, step shows, or chapter meetings — simply present your Yard Pass. Every purchase becomes an opportunity to save.








03








### Save Consistently & Stay Connected


Enjoy real, consistent savings on everything from everyday spending to unforgettable HBCU moments. Your Yard Pass transforms every dollar spent into a statement of culture, pride, and community.











One card. A million ways to save. Rooted in the culture you love.























Member Stories

## Real Savings. Real Community.


From homecomings to everyday dining, Yard Pass members are saving money while proudly representing the organizations and traditions they love.













“I used my Yard Pass at homecoming weekend and saved over $80 between dining, the hotel, and a few shops near campus. It felt like the card was made for us — because it was.”





Tamara J.
HBCU Alumna · Class of ’14











“Between chapter meetings, step shows, and leadership summits, I’m always on the move. The Yard Pass has become as essential as my line jacket — I don’t leave the yard without it.”





Marcus D.
Fraternity Member · Phi Beta Sigma











“I recommend Yard Pass to every student and staff member I meet. The savings are real, but what surprises people most is how much it feels like a celebration of who we are and where we come from.”





Dr. Renee W.
HBCU Faculty · Student Affairs














Homecoming • Howard University • Washington, D.C.







1M+
Discounts Nationwide



$500+
Avg. Annual Member Savings



100%
Built for HBCU Culture


Every purchase becomes an opportunity to save — and to represent.

Whether you represent a chapter, alumni association, Greek organization, or HBCU institution — our team is here to help you explore how Yard Pass fits your community. Connect with us and start turning everyday spending into everyday savings.

Your community pass to savings, culture, and HBCU pride. More than a membership — a lifestyle rooted in excellence.

## Where Culture Meets Savings Every Day — HBCU Yard Pass

Where Culture Meets Savings Every Day — HBCU Yard Pass

Community & Culture

# Where Belonging Meets Tradition


The Yard Pass is more than a savings card — it's a celebration of who we are. From homecoming weekends and step shows to chapter meetings and family reunions, we show up together, save together, and proudly represent the HBCU legacy that shapes us every day.














Representing tradition at every step — homecomings, step shows, cruises, and beyond.




















Our Core Values









### Pride


Your HBCU experience isn't just a memory — it's a living identity. The Yard Pass is built for those who wear their letters, wave their colors, and carry their school's legacy everywhere they go. Every discount you unlock is a reminder that your community has your back, on and off the yard.














### Belonging


From homecomings to step shows, chapter meetings to leadership summits — the HBCU world is built on showing up together. Yard Pass membership connects you to a nationwide network of alumni, Greeks, and culture-keepers who share your story, your traditions, and your drive to thrive.














### Empowerment


Financial empowerment is cultural empowerment. With access to over one million discounts across dining, travel, entertainment, and everyday services, the Yard Pass transforms every purchase into an opportunity to keep more money in your pocket — and more power in your community.













The yard connects generations.






















Our Network



## A Network Built for the HBCU Lifestyle


Yard Pass is designed to support a broad network of local businesses, national savings opportunities, travel experiences, and event-related spending that matter most to the HBCU community. Every swipe connects you to over one million discounts across the country — from everyday dining to iconic homecoming weekends.











Dining & Restaurants
Local favorites & national chains








Hotels & Lodging
Homecoming & travel stays








Entertainment & Events
Step shows, cruises & concerts








Professional Services
Business, legal & financial








Travel & Vacations
Flights, car rentals & cruises








Shopping & Retail
Apparel, gear & lifestyle brands








Greek & Campus Life
Chapter events & leadership summits








Health & Wellness
Fitness memberships & self-care








Family & Entertainment
Theme parks, movies & activities







Partner categories represent the scope of our savings network. Specific brand partnerships and discount availability vary by region and are updated regularly to serve our members best.













## Life on the Yard, Captured


From alumni brunches and campus fashion moments to homecoming arrivals and everyday savings — Yard Pass is woven into the fabric of HBCU life. These are the moments that make the membership more than a card.








Homecoming Arrivals







Alumni Brunch







Yard Pass in Action







Culture & Style







Dining Moments































“



Save with purpose.
Honor the culture.
Represent what matters most.







The Yard Pass was built for more than savings — it was built for community. Every discount you unlock, every dollar you keep, is a quiet act of pride in the organizations, traditions, and culture that shaped you. From homecomings to chapter meetings, step shows to family vacations, your Yard Pass transforms everyday spending into everyday savings — while you proudly represent the HBCU lifestyle you love.



Get Your Yard Pass










Your community pass to savings, culture, and HBCU pride. More than a membership — a lifestyle rooted in excellence.

This space is for alumni groups, Greek organizations, HBCU faculty & staff, and community members who want to discover what the Yard Pass can do for them.

## We're Here for the Community


From membership questions to partnership opportunities and organization programs — our team is ready to connect. Reach out and we'll respond with next steps and all the details you need to start saving with your Yard Pass.

Every message matters to us. Whether you're exploring membership discounts, representing a Greek organization, or looking to bring Yard Pass to your campus — we're proud to serve the HBCU community.



















Got Questions?

## Everything You Need to Know About Yard Pass


We've answered the most common questions from our community. If you need more, we're always just a message away.














### Who is Yard Pass designed for?


Yard Pass was built specifically for the HBCU community — students, alumni, Greek-letter organization members, faculty, and anyone who proudly represents the HBCU lifestyle. Whether you're attending homecoming, a step show, a leadership summit, or simply going about your everyday life, Yard Pass is your trusted companion for saving money while representing the organizations and traditions you love.



01










### What types of savings and discounts are included?


Your Yard Pass membership unlocks access to over one million discounts across the country through a massive nationwide savings network. Savings span everyday categories including dining, travel, shopping, entertainment, health and wellness services, and vacation planning. Every time you dine out, book a trip, shop for essentials, or plan a family outing, your Yard Pass transforms that everyday spending into extraordinary savings opportunities — including exclusive deals aligned with the HBCU lifestyle like cruises and cultural events.



02










### How does my membership support everyday use?


Yard Pass is designed to be a card you reach for every single day — not just on special occasions. Use it at restaurants, retail stores, gyms like Anytime Fitness for membership discounts, service providers, and travel platforms. The savings network is built for real life, meaning whether you're grabbing lunch between classes, booking a weekend getaway, or shopping for your chapter, your membership is actively working for you. It's the kind of everyday savings that quietly adds up to something meaningful over time.



03










### Can organizations inquire about group membership options?


Absolutely. Yard Pass was created with community at its core, and we welcome inquiries from Greek-letter organizations, alumni associations, student government bodies, HBCU chapters, and other community groups interested in group or bulk membership arrangements. Whether you're planning to offer Yard Pass as a member benefit at chapter meetings, conferences, or homecoming events, we'd love to connect and explore what makes sense for your organization. Reach out through our contact form and a member of our team will follow up with you directly.



04








Still have questions? Send us a message — we're here for the community.






















Built for the Culture


## Savings, Pride & Community — All in One Pass


Yard Pass was built with one purpose: to serve the HBCU community with real savings, deep cultural pride, and genuine connection. Whether you're heading to homecoming, planning a family vacation, or simply dining out after a chapter meeting — your Yard Pass is always working for you. We're not just a discount card. We're a trusted companion for the HBCU lifestyle.


✦

Every member. Every moment. Every discount — rooted in community and powered by pride.

✦

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Membership Benefits
- Community & Culture



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/25/2026



HBCU Yard Pass ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: HBCU Yard Pass

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









Your community pass to savings, culture, and HBCU pride. More than a membership — a lifestyle rooted in excellence.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Membership Benefits
- Community & Culture



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



HBCU Yard Pass is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: HBCU Yard Pass

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Your community pass to savings, culture, and HBCU pride. More than a membership — a lifestyle rooted in excellence.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Membership Benefits
- Community & Culture



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - HBCU Yard Pass

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Membership Services / Discount Programs provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


HBCU Yard Pass provides Membership Services / Discount Programs through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by HBCU Yard Pass. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: HBCU Yard Pass

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
